feed.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM ED-FRC-D1.

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.55.1
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.55.1

Part: ED R FORCE

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.53.2
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.53.2

Part: ED R FORCE

Please ensure your AXS App is on the latest version from the app store to activate the following improvements.  This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements

Released: 2025-09-17

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.49.1
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.49.1

Part: ED R FORCE

* Minor Bug Fixes, Platform updates and reliability improvements * Default shift assignment added for wireless blips

Released: 2024-05-29

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.42.0
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.42.0

Part: ED R FORCE

General bug fixes and reliability improvements.

Released: 2023-01-12

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.29.6
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.29.6

Part: ED R FORCE

* Fixed bug: rapidly pressing Clics or Blips prevents derailleur(s) from actuating * Fixed bug: pressing and holding a brake-shift lever AXS button for an extended period can unpair shifter from system

Released: 2022-02-07

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.29.4
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.29.4

Part: ED R FORCE

Battery life improvements – LED illuminates for a shorter period of time when shifter powers up with a low battery. eTap 11-speed derailleur compatibility added – RED and Force eTap AXS 12-speed shift-brake levers and eTap AXS BlipBox can now be paired with legacy eTap 11-speed front and rear derailleurs.

Released: 2021-12-02

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.3.6
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.3.6

Part: ED R FORCE

Resolved issue with high battery consumption in some units.

Released: 2020-06-12

entry.title: FORCE CONTROLLER (R) (ED-FRC-D1) — firmware 2.3.2
entry.summary:
FORCE CONTROLLER (R) ED-FRC-D1 — firmware 2.3.2

Part: ED R FORCE

Initial release.

Released: 2020-06-12
